name: API Health Check → Alert on Failure
description: Polls an API endpoint every 5 minutes, validates the response, and sends a Slack alert if the response is outside acceptable bounds.

required_secrets.description: Slack bot token with chat:write scope

replacements.config_delta: Replace CHANNEL with TO (on-call address), SUBJECT (e.g. 'API Health Alert'), and BODY. Required secret: google/gmail_oauth_token instead of slack/bot_token.
Replace CHANNEL+BOT_TOKEN with TOPIC (e.g. 'alerts.health'). Downstream systems (PagerDuty bridge, alertmanager) subscribe to the NATS topic.

Replace CHANNEL+BOT_TOKEN with WEBHOOK_URL_SECRET='teams/webhook_url'. Set TITLE='API Health Alert' and COLOR='#D13438' for red urgent alerts. Required secret: teams/webhook_url instead of slack/bot_token.

Replace Slack config with INTEGRATION_KEY_SECRET='pagerduty/integration_key', SUMMARY='API health check failed', SEVERITY='critical'. Set DEDUP_KEY to the monitored URL to deduplicate repeat alerts. Required secret: pagerduty/integration_key instead of slack/bot_token.
